project.name: Minitia.fun
project.tagline: Instant Appchain Launcher — launch anything, graduate fast.
project.summary: Fair-launch appchain launcher on Initia. Mint a token in seconds, trade on a 100ms-block bonding curve, graduate liquidity to InitiaDEX, and promote the community into its own sovereign L2 rollup — all from one cockpit.
project.pointOfView: Pump.fun proved the market for instant-launch token economies but graduation ends at a DEX. On Initia, graduation is just the beginning — successful communities fork into their own sovereign L2 with custom execution and fee economics. Launch-to-sovereignty in a single product.

modules.name: token_factory
modules.description: Registry of fair-launched tokens; records creator, ticker, name, .fun.init subdomain, launch_index. 6 tokens live on-chain as of submission.

modules.name: bonding_curve
modules.description: Integral linear-curve pricing (Phase 2: real umin custody via primary_fungible_store vault). 0.5% fee retained to creator. Buy/sell/create_pool/claim_fees entries. Graduation threshold 10 MIN (demo) freezes the curve and unlocks the promotion flow.

modules.name: comments
modules.description: Per-ticker public comment wall. Permissionless posts (280-char cap) stored in Table<String, Thread>; CommentPosted events make the feed scannable via tx_search. Social signal layer for each token.

modules.name: liquidity_migrator
modules.description: Coordinates appchain promotion. stage_promotion() (creator-gated) snapshots final reserve/supply and emits PromotionStaged; off-chain promoter daemon consumes the event, spawns a sovereign rollup via scripts/spawn-local.mjs, then creator calls record_rollup() to persist the new chain_id + RPC on-chain. Demonstrated end-to-end for $SPX → spx-fun-1.

proof.txSubmissionNote: All state transitions (launch, buy/sell, graduate, stage_promotion, record_rollup) emit events decodable via RPC tx_search. See .initia/PROOF-SPX.md for the full audit trail.

autoSign.uxEffect: Buy/Sell on Trade page executes without wallet popups after first session-key grant.

interwovenBridge.uxEffect: Users deposit from Ethereum, Solana, or any supported chain in one step.

economicFlywheel.launchFee: Small INIT fee per token → protocol revenue
economicFlywheel.graduationThresholdNote: Temporary hackathon demo value. Production bumps back to ~5000 MIN; constant lives at bonding_curve.move::GRADUATION_INIT_RESERVE.
economicFlywheel.graduationDestination: Sovereign appchain spawn via liquidity_migrator + scripts/spawn-local.mjs (bootstrapped minimove rollup, creator-seeded genesis)
economicFlywheel.enshrinedLiquidity: Graduated tokens become L1 staking-eligible for network-security rewards.
economicFlywheel.vipRewards: Eligible for esINIT distribution every 2 weeks; redistributed to active traders as loyalty incentive.

targetUsers: Memecoin community founders seeking L2 graduation upside
DeFi protocol founders who want a Move L2 without infra cost

competitors.name: Pump.fun
competitors.ourEdge: Graduation continues into a sovereign L2 rollup — they stop at Raydium.

competitors.name: Virtuals
competitors.ourEdge: Category-agnostic (any token, not only AI agents).

competitors.name: Believe
competitors.ourEdge: Move VM asset safety + Interwoven Bridge onboarding across all chains.

competitors.name: Base memecoin apps
competitors.ourEdge: 100ms blocks vs 2s, native cross-chain deposit, no bridge friction.

distributionLevers: X algorithmic reach via fair-launch transaction firehose
Telegram alpha channels for new-token notifications
Cross-chain deposits open onboarding from any ecosystem
Graduated-token success stories as case studies

milestones.phase1Complete: Full UI + InterwovenKit + AutoSign + Bridge + Usernames. 4 custom Move modules (token_factory, bonding_curve, comments, liquidity_migrator) deployed on minitia-fun-test-1.
milestones.phase2Complete: Real umin custody. primary_fungible_store vault object holds reserve; buy() pulls umin from trader wallet, sell() + claim_fees() pay out via vault signer. No more synthetic reserve.
milestones.phaseAComplete: Sovereign appchain promotion end-to-end demonstrated on $SPX. Creator staged via UI (tx 968F414F), off-chain promoter daemon generated genesis config, scripts/spawn-local.mjs bootstrapped spx-fun-1 at localhost:61867, creator recorded the live rollup on-chain (tx A4339DF7). Second chain runs concurrently with main rollup.
milestones.nextSteps: OPinit bridge integration to initiation-2 L1, InitiaDEX pool auto-seeding on spawned chains, multi-validator decentralization via opchild + challenger.

techStack.styling: Tailwind CSS 3 with custom Sovereign Velocity design tokens
techStack.typography: Instrument Serif (display) + Bricolage Grotesque (UI) + JetBrains Mono (data)

complianceChecklist.demoVideo: See .initia/demo.md for production-ready script; video file to be attached with final submission.
complianceChecklist.onChainProof: Real tx submitted on initiation-2 via requestTxBlock on Launchpad Deploy action.
